name: edge-lite-mode-cached-research
query: /design-log lite — add a CSV export button to the admin submissions table. We researched CSV/export UX last month.
expected_behavior: Runs Lite Mode: 2-3 clarifying questions instead of 5+, compressed template Sections 3-5
Checks .agent/design-logs/research-index.md first — a <90-day domain entry satisfies Phase B with zero new searches (delta research only)
All hard gates still apply: branch setup (A0), EnterPlanMode before exploration, DL file saved as [DRAFT], ExitPlanMode single approval, Phase E handoff
Does not treat 'lite' as permission to skip Phase A entirely or to self-approve
